name: The Mask Singer Thailand
original_name: The Mask Singer หน้ากากนักร้อง
overview: The Mask Singer is a Thai singing competition program presented by Kan Kantathavorn. The contestants are broken up into four groups, each group containing 8 masked celebrities. Each episode consists of two pairs of battling contestants, up until the final for each group, where the contestants perform a duet before battling it out. The winner reveals their identity in the last episode of each season.

trailers.title: วิธีแสดงความรัก ของนักร้องใต้หน้ากาก !! | THE MASK SOULMATE หน้ากากคู่แท้
